childElements.name: CF01
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "What are your primary financial goals for the upcoming year? Are there any major life events we should be aware of?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Examples: retirement, home purchase, college funding, business sale, inheritance, new baby, marriage, etc.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CF02
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Have you started receiving any new sources of income since our last meeting?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "This includes salary changes, side income, rental income, business distributions, pension, Social Security, etc.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CF03
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Do you expect any large one-time purchases or expenditures this year?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Examples: vacation, vehicle, equipment, real estate, home renovation, wedding, etc. Helps with cash flow forecasting.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CF04File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your most recent pay stub.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Used to verify current income, withholdings, and employer benefit elections.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF05File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your most recent Social Security statement.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Available at ssa.gov/myaccount. Used for retirement income projections and benefit optimization.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF06File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your updated Lifestyle Expenditures spreadsheet.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "This is the household budget/spending worksheet provided by your advisor. If you need a blank copy, please let us know.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF07File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your most recent tax return(s) — both personal and business, if applicable.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Federal returns preferred. Used for income verification, deduction review, and tax planning opportunities.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF08File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If applicable, please upload your most recent business financial statements.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Includes P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statements. Used for business income verification and planning.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF09File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your most recent qualified retirement account statements.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Includes 401(k), IRA, Roth IRA, SEP-IRA, 403(b), and similar accounts. Statements from the most recent quarter preferred.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF10File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please upload your most recent taxable and outside account statements.", "help" : true, "helpText" : "Includes individual brokerage, trust accounts, business investment accounts, annuities, and any assets not held at Ascentis.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: CF11File
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Do you have any additional documents you would like to add to your secure vault?", "help" : true, "helpText" : "The vault is your secure document storage within our platform. Upload any items you'd like us to have on file.", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

omniProcessElements.name: CashFlow
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Q1 - Cash Flow", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "autoSaveLabel" : "Auto Save on Assessment Progress", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "autoSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
